biometrics.body_build: slender and toned athletic figure, well-proportioned skeletal structure

facial_anatomy_constants.face_shape: soft oval face contour, clean defined jawline, smooth cheekbone transitions
facial_anatomy_constants.eyes: almond-shaped dark brown eyes, thin parallel double eyelids, clear vibrant gaze
facial_anatomy_constants.nose: straight narrow bridge, refined and slightly upturned nose tip
facial_anatomy_constants.mouth: symmetrical lip line, distinct cupid's bow, natural soft plumpness
facial_anatomy_constants.skin_profile: porcelain skin tone, natural flawless texture, ultra-fine micro-pores visible under close-up

permanent_signature_marks.visual_description: a single tiny distinct dark brown beauty mark
permanent_signature_marks.anatomical_location: exactly 1cm below the outer corner of the left eye

default_hair.cut: sleek shoulder-length blunt tassel bob cut

brand_signature_styles.default_makeup_vibe: clean and minimalist K-beauty profile, soft coral lips
brand_signature_styles.default_wardrobe_vibe: minimalist quiet luxury, neutral tones, tailored blazers
